TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_matatengil_kakitizaan_nu_Sakizaya_20180311, title = matatengil_kakitizaan_nu_Sakizaya_20180311, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/matatengil_kakitizaan_nu_Sakizaya_20180311} }

S.FORM: matatengil kakitizaan nu Sakizaya demiadː 2018.03.11 14:30-17:30 kakitizaanː Nabakuwan (Kalingku) a se Sakul niyazu' Kofuli Saungay nu binawlan teban a luma' u heci nu matatengilː 1.Walewalelan : itiza iteban nu Tungao東澳 atu Hanpen漢本. walel sananay ku uway nu bila' . wale-walel-an, yadah ku walel i buyu', sisa pangangan tu Walewalelan. naayaway a babalaki tayni miadup atu milami', maazih itini yadah ku walel, sisa, panganganen ku Walewalelan. tina kakitizaan itiza i Yilan a kuwan, ayza sa u Talukuay a subal tuway. amis 24"30'12.91, wali 121"50'04.35 katukuh amis 24"29'49.32 wali 121"49'43.00, ilaed 640m. 2.Lalabian ipabaw nu Sakul niyazu', i buyubuyuan, i masazukuay nu buyu'. sakamusa ku babalaki, natayza miadup atu milami' i buyu', anu caykaletep taluma', itiza tu milabin. sisa, panganganen ku Lalabian. 3.Kamukamulan ipabaw nu buyu' nu 佳山基地Katangka. kamul sananay u kilang 油桐樹, si sangelacay a balu, bangcalay a kilang, u Ngayngayay cidekay a kilang. amis 24"02'20.14 wali 121"34'15.85
S.PHON: matatəŋir~ɾ kakitizaan nu sakizaja dəmiad* ****.**.** **:**-**:** kakitizaan* nabakuwan (kar~ɾiŋku) a sə sakur~ɾ nijazuʔ~ʡ kofur~ɾi sauŋaj nu binawr~ɾan təban a r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ u ħəʦi nu matatəŋir~ɾ* *.war~ɾəwar~ɾər~ɾan : itiza itəban nu tuŋao** atu ħanpən**. war~ɾər~ɾ sananaj ku uwaj nu bir~ɾaʔ~ʡ . war~ɾə-war~ɾər~ɾ-an, jadaħ ku war~ɾər~ɾ i bujuʔ~ʡ, sisa paŋaŋan tu war~ɾəwar~ɾər~ɾan. naajawaj a babar~ɾaki tajni miadup atu mir~ɾamiʔ~ʡ, maaziħ itini jadaħ ku war~ɾər~ɾ, sisa, paŋaŋanən ku war~ɾəwar~ɾər~ɾan. tina kakitizaan itiza i jir~ɾan a kuwan, ajza sa u tar~ɾukuaj a subar~ɾ tuwaj. amis **"**ʔ~ʡ**.**, war~ɾi ***"**ʔ~ʡ**.** katukuħ amis **"**ʔ~ʡ**.** war~ɾi ***"**ʔ~ʡ**.**, ir~ɾaəd ***m. *.r~ɾar~ɾabian ipabaw nu sakur~ɾ nijazuʔ~ʡ, i bujubujuan, i masazukuaj nu bujuʔ~ʡ. sakamusa ku babar~ɾaki, natajza miadup atu mir~ɾamiʔ~ʡ i bujuʔ~ʡ, anu ʦajkar~ɾətəp tar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ, itiza tu mir~ɾabin. sisa, paŋaŋanən ku r~ɾar~ɾabian. *.kamukamur~ɾan ipabaw nu bujuʔ~ʡ nu ****kataŋka. kamur~ɾ sananaj u kir~ɾaŋ ***, si saŋər~ɾaʦaj a bar~ɾu, baŋʦar~ɾaj a kir~ɾaŋ, u ŋajŋajaj ʦidəkaj a kir~ɾaŋ. amis **"**ʔ~ʡ**.** war~ɾi ***"**ʔ~ʡ**.**
S.FORM: matatengil kakitizaan nu Sakizaya demiadː 2018.03.11 14:30-17:30 kakitizaanː Nabakuwan (Kalingku) a se Sakul niyazu' Kofuli Saungay nu binawlan teban a luma' u heci nu matatengilː 1.Walewalelan : itiza iteban nu Tungao東澳 atu Hanpen漢本. walel sananay ku uway nu bila' . wale-walel-an, yadah ku walel i buyu', sisa pangangan tu Walewalelan. naayaway a babalaki tayni miadup atu milami', maazih itini yadah ku walel, sisa, panganganen ku Walewalelan. tina kakitizaan itiza i Yilan a kuwan, ayza sa u Talukuay a subal tuway. amis 24"30'12.91, wali 121"50'04.35 katukuh amis 24"29'49.32 wali 121"49'43.00, ilaed 640m. 2.Lalabian ipabaw nu Sakul niyazu', i buyubuyuan, i masazukuay nu buyu'. sakamusa ku babalaki, natayza miadup atu milami' i buyu', anu caykaletep taluma', itiza tu milabin. sisa, panganganen ku Lalabian. 3.Kamukamulan ipabaw nu buyu' nu 佳山基地Katangka. kamul sananay u kilang 油桐樹, si sangelacay a balu, bangcalay a kilang, u Ngayngayay cidekay a kilang. amis 24"02'20.14 wali 121"34'15.85
S.PHON: matatəŋir~ɾ kakitizaan nu sakizaja dəmiad* ****.**.** **:**-**:** kakitizaan* nabakuwan (kar~ɾiŋku) a sə sakur~ɾ nijazuʔ~ʡ kofur~ɾi sauŋaj nu binawr~ɾan təban a r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ u ħəʦi nu matatəŋir~ɾ* *.war~ɾəwar~ɾər~ɾan : itiza itəban nu tuŋao** atu ħanpən**. war~ɾər~ɾ sananaj ku uwaj nu bir~ɾaʔ~ʡ . war~ɾə-war~ɾər~ɾ-an, jadaħ ku war~ɾər~ɾ i bujuʔ~ʡ, sisa paŋaŋan tu war~ɾəwar~ɾər~ɾan. naajawaj a babar~ɾaki tajni miadup atu mir~ɾamiʔ~ʡ, maaziħ itini jadaħ ku war~ɾər~ɾ, sisa, paŋaŋanən ku war~ɾəwar~ɾər~ɾan. tina kakitizaan itiza i jir~ɾan a kuwan, ajza sa u tar~ɾukuaj a subar~ɾ tuwaj. amis **"**ʔ~ʡ**.**, war~ɾi ***"**ʔ~ʡ**.** katukuħ amis **"**ʔ~ʡ**.** war~ɾi ***"**ʔ~ʡ**.**, ir~ɾaəd ***m. *.r~ɾar~ɾabian ipabaw nu sakur~ɾ nijazuʔ~ʡ, i bujubujuan, i masazukuaj nu bujuʔ~ʡ. sakamusa ku babar~ɾaki, natajza miadup atu mir~ɾamiʔ~ʡ i bujuʔ~ʡ, anu ʦajkar~ɾətəp tar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ, itiza tu mir~ɾabin. sisa, paŋaŋanən ku r~ɾar~ɾabian. *.kamukamur~ɾan ipabaw nu bujuʔ~ʡ nu ****kataŋka. kamur~ɾ sananaj u kir~ɾaŋ ***, si saŋər~ɾaʦaj a bar~ɾu, baŋʦar~ɾaj a kir~ɾaŋ, u ŋajŋajaj ʦidəkaj a kir~ɾaŋ. amis **"**ʔ~ʡ**.** war~ɾi ***"**ʔ~ʡ**.**
